message:
feat(ftui-render): improve rendering correctness and terminal compatibility

Switch OSC 8 hyperlink sequences from ST (ESC \) terminator to BEL (\x07)
for broader terminal compatibility, as many terminals handle BEL more
reliably for OSC sequences.

Fix presenter wide-character tail repair to only apply to direct wide
chars (not grapheme-pool refs), preventing unintended broad row rewrites
from multi-column grapheme payloads. Orphan continuation cells are now
cleared with a space instead of CUF cursor movement, ensuring stale
terminal content cannot leak through.

Apply viewport_offset_y to all CUP cursor positioning calls so inline-mode
rendering correctly accounts for the vertical offset of the UI region.

Fix DropNewest queue policy in frame guardrails to correctly calculate
excess items instead of always dropping exactly one, matching DropOldest
behavior for symmetry.

Replace hardcoded magic number 127 with GraphemeId::MAX_WIDTH constant
throughout buffer, cell, frame, and grapheme_pool modules for clarity
and maintainability. Add boundary test for max-length URL registration
in link_registry and a test for SOH (\x01) char handling in CellContent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
